list.vod_content: The boarding house residents felt something strange in their residence. Rumors circulated that the cheap boarding house asked for a sacrifice in the form of someone's life. One of the apparitions they often saw was a terrifying pocong.

list.vod_content: Bacon plays Stan Olszewski, a sharp, funny, but chronically underachieving security guard, who breaks up an attempted robbery at the home of Cynthia Rand (Sedgwick), a successful urologist married to brilliant former Watergate prosecutor Warren Rand (Judd Hirsch). From this chance encounter grows a charged and dynamic friendship â€“ first as late-night text sessions filled with h...

list.vod_blurb: A man with a troubled past decides to turn his life around after a heroic act by training for a mixe
list.vod_content: A man with a troubled past decides to turn his life around after a heroic act by training for a mixed martial arts tournament.

list.vod_blurb: In â€œMuzzle: City of Wolves,â€‌ Jake Rosser (Eckhart), haunted by PTSD from his days as a K-9 officer,
list.vod_content: In â€œMuzzle: City of Wolves,â€‌ Jake Rosser (Eckhart), haunted by PTSD from his days as a K-9 officer, endeavors to lead a peaceful life with his family and retired K-9 companion, Socks. But the tranquility quickly dissolves when a ruthless gang targets them in a brutal attack. Determined to protect his loved ones, Jake and his new K-9 partner Argos delve into a violent underbelly...

list.vod_blurb: A stalled actress mired in the monotony of family life heads back to her hometown to care for her ai
list.vod_content: A stalled actress mired in the monotony of family life heads back to her hometown to care for her ailing father, only to be drawn back into a dysfunctional relationship with her sisters, and tempted by the first love that got away.
